title: Amtech G1665 Corner trowel with soft grip

VERSATILE: It is ideal plastering tool for finishing internal corners
VERSATILE SIZE: Suitable for a wide range of household and trade applications
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
HOUSEHOLD & PROFESSIONAL USE: Suitable for DIYers and tradespeople alike

So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details.
